query: SELECT id, action, details, createdAt FROM activity_logs WHERE (details LIKE '%llm%' OR details LIKE '%LLM%' OR details LIKE '%error%' OR details LIKE '%fail%' OR action LIKE '%scan%') AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 HOUR) ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT id, action, details, createdAt FROM activity_logs WHERE (details LIKE '%llm%' OR details LIKE '%LLM%' OR details LIKE '%error%' OR details LIKE '%fail%' OR action LIKE '%scan%') AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 HOUR) ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20
